blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,677 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 15" over the past week. Current depth: 72".
